summary: Tested FinRomania 2.0 — Portofoliu BVB PRO Faza 2 (Analysis). All 30 backend tests passed (100%). All 9 frontend scenarios verified via Playwright. GET /api/portfolio-bvb/analysis works correctly: sector_allocation (Energie+Financiar), fundamentals from EODHD cache (BRD: PE=12.84 green, ROE=15.4% green, D/E=8.27 red; H2O: PE=null N/A, ROE=13.4%, D/E=null N/A), history snapshot deduplication confirmed. Frontend: analysis-section visible, donut chart renders, evolution chart shows 'Date insuficiente' (1 snapshot < 2), color coding correct.

issues: H2O P/B shows 0.00 in GREEN because pb_ratio=0 is stored in MongoDB (not null). 0 is not a realistic P/B ratio. This is a data quality note from EODHD cache, not a code bug — spec says null=N/A and 0 is not null. Code behaves correctly.

passed_tests: ✅ Response has all top-level fields: sector_allocation, fundamentals, history, total_value
✅ sector_allocation is list with 2 entries: Energie, Financiar
✅ Each sector entry has: sector, value, percent
✅ Energie value ~7390 RON (H2O 50 shares × live price)
✅ Financiar value ~5600 RON (BRD 200 shares × live price)
✅ fundamentals is list with 2 entries: BRD, H2O
✅ All fundamentals have required fields: symbol, pe_ratio, roe_percent, eps, debt_equity, pb_ratio
✅ History entries have date and value fields
✅ No duplicate snapshot after calling /analysis twice same day (history stays at length=1)
✅ history.length = 1 < 2 → frontend shows 'Date insuficiente pentru grafic' message
✅ Frontend: Donut PieChart (.recharts-pie) renders correctly with Energie (blue 56.9%) + Financiar (green 43.1%)
✅ Frontend: BRD P/E = 12,84 displayed in GREEN (emerald-600, good: 0 < 12.84 < 15)
✅ Frontend: BRD ROE = 15,40% displayed in GREEN (emerald-600, good: > 15%)
✅ Frontend: BRD D/E = 8,27 displayed in RED (red-500, bad: > 3)
✅ Frontend: H2O P/E = N/A (null from cache)
✅ Frontend: H2O D/E = N/A (null from cache)
✅ Frontend: H2O ROE = 13,40% in default color (13.4 is not > 15, not < 0)
✅ Frontend: Evolution chart shows 'Date insuficiente pentru grafic / Revino mâine' (1 snapshot < 2 needed)
action_items: MINOR/DATA: H2O has pb_ratio=0 in MongoDB (EODHD cache stores 0 instead of null). Displays as 0.00 in green (0 < 1.5 = good condition). Consider treating pb_ratio=0 as null in backend logic if 0 is not a valid financial value.
critical_code_review_comments: CODE QUALITY: analysis endpoint fetches fundamentals sequentially per symbol in a loop (await db.fundamentals_daily_cache.find_one per symbol). For 2 positions this is fine, but for larger portfolios consider a single find({symbol: {$in: symbols}}) batch query.

DATA NOTE: H2O pb_ratio stored as 0 in fundamentals_daily_cache (not null). Frontend shows 0.00 in green. If EODHD doesn't provide a valid P/B for H2O, the cache script should store null instead of 0.
SNAPSHOT DEDUPLICATION: Works correctly — existing_snap check prevents same-day duplicates.
test_credentials: Demo PRO: GET /api/auth/demo-login?secret=finromania-demo-2026 → session_token. localStorage keys: finromania_token, finromania_user
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Demo portfolio unchanged: H2O (50 shares @ 65 RON) + BRD (200 shares @ 15 RON). One portfolio_value_history snapshot for 2026-03-27 (12990.0 RON).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Faza 2 Analysis fully verified. GET /api/portfolio-bvb/analysis returns correct sector_allocation (Energie+Financiar), fundamentals (BRD+H2O with real EODHD cache data), history (1 snapshot, no duplicates), total_value. Frontend analysis-section renders: donut chart (Recharts PieChart), evolution chart with 'Date insuficiente' message (1 < 2 data points), fundamentals table with correct color coding (BRD PE/ROE green, BRD D/E red, H2O nulls as N/A). MongoDB collections: fundamentals_daily_cache, portfolio_value_history. Auth: finromania_token in localStorage.
